title: HR Operating Model Design
description: Assess, design, and implement lean HR processes, from workforce planning to performance management, tailored for scaling technology teams.
outcome: Standardized, auditable, and automation-ready HR processes across regions.

title: Web3 Talent Strategy
description: Design operating models, role architectures, and talent strategies for blockchain, DeFi, and digital asset organizations entering new markets.
outcome: Clear hiring roadmap aligned to product, compliance, and go-to-market milestones.

title: Remote Team Scaling
description: Build distributed team structures, onboarding playbooks, and performance frameworks that maintain culture and accountability across time zones.
outcome: Scalable remote team model with clear role definitions and communication protocols.

title: Policy & Compliance Advisory
description: Design HR policies, employee handbooks, and compliance frameworks aligned with local labor regulations and industry standards.
outcome: Compliant, clear, and manager-friendly policy documentation.
